title: The Reason for Bugha the Elder ' s March against the Banu Numayr and What Took Place between Them
description: Banu Numayr and What Took Place between Them I was informed168 by Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Makhlad169 concerning most of their account. He was said to be with Bugha on this journey. But the rest of the account derives from someone else.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
